subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou hearest the fire that blazeth within me, and the cry of my heart, and the lamentation of my spirit, and the sighing of my soul, and mine anguish and longing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی تسمع زفیر ناری و صریخ فوادی و حنین روحی و انین قلبی و تاوهی و تلهفی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @visitation Tablets, @prayer for martyrs, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
